mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM customer_system WHERE system_code = #{systemCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_system SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE customer_system SET is_selected = #{isSelected}, selection_reason = #{selectionReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE customer_system SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'inactive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN is_selected = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as selected_systems, COUNT(DISTINCT system_type) as system_type_count, COUNT(DISTINCT business_domain) as business_domain_count FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT system_type as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY system_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT business_criticality as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND business_criticality IS NOT NULL GROUP BY business_criticality ORDER BY business_criticality
SELECT security_level as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND security_level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY security_level ORDER BY security_level

SELECT cs.* FROM customer_system cs LEFT JOIN system_assessment sa ON cs.id = sa.system_id AND sa.deleted = 0 WHERE cs.deleted = 0 AND cs.status = 'active' AND (sa.id IS NULL OR sa.assessment_date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) ORDER BY cs.priority_level DESC, cs.business_criticality DESC
SELECT * FROM customer_system WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'active' AND is_selected = 1 ORDER BY priority_level DESC, business_criticality DESC
SELECT CONCAT('S', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(system_code, 8)), 0) + 1, 4, '0')) FROM customer_system WHERE system_code LIKE CONCAT('S', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), '%')
SELECT * FROM customer_system WHERE business_domain = #{businessDomain} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY business_criticality DESC, system_name

SELECT 'business_owner' as owner_type, business_owner as owner_name, COUNT(*) as system_count FROM customer_system WHERE deleted = 0 AND business_owner IS NOT NULL GROUP BY business_owner
UNION ALL
SELECT 'it_owner' as owner_type, it_owner as owner_name, COUNT(*) as system_count FROM customer_system WHERE deleted = 0 AND it_owner IS NOT NULL GROUP BY it_owner
UNION ALL
SELECT 'data_owner' as owner_type, data_owner as owner_name, COUNT(*) as system_count FROM customer_system WHERE deleted = 0 AND data_owner IS NOT NULL GROUP BY data_owner
ORDER BY owner_type, system_count DESC

SELECT * FROM customer_system WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'active' AND (last_security_assessment IS NULL OR last_security_assessment < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) ORDER BY business_criticality DESC, system_name

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN estimated_data_volume = 'small' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as small_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN estimated_data_volume = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN estimated_data_volume = 'large' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as large_systems, SUM(CASE WHEN estimated_data_volume = 'very_large' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as very_large_systems, AVG(CASE WHEN data_growth_rate = 'low' THEN 5 WHEN data_growth_rate = 'medium' THEN 15 WHEN data_growth_rate = 'high' THEN 30 ELSE 0 END) as avg_growth_rate_percent FROM customer_system WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
